title: Syrian-Style Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Middle Eastern-inspired dish, featuring tender chicken and nutty pilaf.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 6-8 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the crushed garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the Syrian pilaf to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes until lightly toasted.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Season the pilaf with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken on top of the pilaf and garnish with additional parsley if desired.
